//: The gateway is a stateful long-running server (SQLite on disk, in-memory agent pool, WebSocket server, a scheduler tick loop, and node-pty/tmux child processes running Claude Code sessions). None of that can run on Vercel's stateless/ephemeral serverless platform, so this project must NOT deploy here. Deploy the gateway on a persistent host (Railway / Fly.io / Render / a VPS) instead. deploymentEnabled:false stops Vercel creating deployments for these branches. For a complete kill, also disconnect the Git repo or delete the project in the Vercel dashboard.
